signal_divergences.label: Shape mismatch
signal_divergences.description: Different number of channels and/or samples between derivatives.

signal_divergences.label: Channel order mismatch
signal_divergences.description: Same channels available but order differs.

signal_divergences.label: Missing channels
signal_divergences.description: One derivative removed channels that are present in the other.

signal_divergences.label: Amplitude scaling
signal_divergences.description: Global RMS ratio significantly differs (unit/reference mismatch candidate).

signal_divergences.label: Polarity flip
signal_divergences.description: Strong negative correlation indicates potential sign inversion.

signal_divergences.label: Temporal shift
signal_divergences.description: Latency offset across derivatives (event alignment issue candidate).
